name: bug
describe: Run the full Bug Flow: reproduce the failure, plan the fix, implement it, review the PR, and fix review findings when needed.

steps.reason: Reproduce the reported bug with a focused failing test and preserve the failure signature.
Create the implementation plan from the reproduced failure and issue context.
Implement the fix, verify it, and open or update the pull request.
Review the generated pull request before calling the bug flow complete.
Apply review feedback when the review reports concerns or a blocking failure.
